feeds.title: 药物 · 临床试验
feeds.term: (lecanemab OR donanemab OR "anti-amyloid" OR "tau-targeting" OR trontinemab) AND ("clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR phase OR efficacy)

feeds.title: 机制 · 基础研究
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND (amyloid OR tau OR neuroinflammation OR APOE OR microglia) AND (mechanism OR pathology OR pathogenesis)

feeds.title: 诊断 · 生物标志物
feeds.term: (Alzheimer) AND ("p-tau217" OR "plasma biomarker" OR "blood biomarker" OR "amyloid PET" OR "GFAP") AND (diagnosis OR detection OR screening)

feeds.title: 预防 · 生活方式
feeds.term: (Alzheimer OR dementia) AND (prevention OR diet OR exercise OR "cognitive reserve" OR lifestyle OR "physical activity") AND (cohort OR "risk factor" OR longitudinal)

feeds.title: 新手村 · 入门综述
feeds.term: ("Alzheimer Disease"[Mesh]) AND ("Review"[Publication Type]) AND (overview OR introduction OR "current understanding" OR primer OR basics)

drug.title: Microglial checkpoint collapse in Alzheimer's disease: a tri-axial framework for biomarker-informed neuroimmune therapy.
drug.zh: 小胶质细胞检查点崩溃是AD神经免疫治疗的关键靶点，提出三轴框架指导生物标志物分层治疗。

drug.title: Longitudinal biomarkers in dementia with Lewy bodies: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
drug.zh: 路易体痴呆纵向生物标志物荟萃分析揭示，脑萎缩和脑脊液标志物可有效追踪疾病进展。

drug.title: Anti-amyloid therapy eligibility in a longitudinal brain-donor cohort with post mortem confirmation.
drug.zh: 纵向尸检队列中，仅约25%早期病理确诊AD患者符合抗淀粉样蛋白治疗资格，血管病变等排除标准大幅限制真实世界适用性。

drug.title: Quantifying Short-Term Functional Changes After Lecanemab Treatment in Early Alzheimer's Disease: An Exploratory 3-Month Follow-Up Case Report Using Eye Movement and Gait Analysis.
drug.zh: 伦卡奈单抗治疗3个月后，早期AD患者的眼动与步态分析可量化短期功能改善。

drug.title: The potential of key Alzheimer's plasma biomarkers to mimic tau PET MUBADA-based disease staging.
drug.zh: 血浆P-tau217等生物标志物可替代tau-PET对阿尔茨海默病进行精准分期。

drug.title: Immunotherapy with B28, an antibody to Aβ oligomers, potently decreases amyloid plaques, microgliosis, and memory decline in APP knock-in mice.
drug.zh: B28抗体通过清除Aβ寡聚体和斑块，显著减轻APP敲入小鼠的神经炎症和记忆衰退。

drug.title: The mechanisms and strategies for Alzheimer's disease prevention: An update.
drug.zh: 综述更新了AD预防策略，强调控制高血压、糖尿病及补充微量元素等可改变风险因素。

drug.title: Simulation of long-term lecanemab treatment effect on Alzheimer's disease progression.
drug.zh: 模拟显示，仑卡奈单抗治疗可将阿尔茨海默病进展时间延缓约37%。

mech.title: Senescent cells accumulate lipid droplets.
mech.zh: 衰老细胞通过脂滴积累驱动阿尔茨海默病相关代谢重编程。

mech.title: From infection to dysfunction: viral triggers and antiviral immune factors in Alzheimer's disease pathology.
mech.zh: 病毒感染通过神经炎症、淀粉样变和tau蛋白病变等途径驱动阿尔茨海默病，而宿主抗病毒机制失调会加剧神经损伤。

mech.title: [Consistency evaluation of the domestic Lifotronic platform and foreign luminescence platforms in detecting core cerebrospinal fluid biomarkers in Chinese Alzheimer disease patients].
mech.zh: 国产Lifotronic平台与进口发光平台检测中国AD患者脑脊液核心生物标志物结果一致，诊断符合率高。

mech.title: Exercise and fluoxetine in Alzheimer's disease: Molecular mechanisms of synergistic and antagonistic effects (Review).
mech.zh: 运动协同氟西汀通过线粒体与神经营养通路改善AD病理，但氟西汀可能拮抗部分运动获益。

mech.title: [Exploring mechanism of "treating different diseases with the same method" for depression and Alzheimer's disease based on "liver-spleen-kidney" axis and advances in traditional Chinese medicine intervention].
mech.journal: Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zho
mech.zh: 基于“肝-脾-肾”轴，中医“异病同治”理论为抑郁与阿尔茨海默病共病提供共同干预机制。

mech.title: [Quercetin improves cognitive impairment in mice with Alzheimer's disease by inhibiting inflammatory response and activating cAMP/PKA/CREB signaling pathway].
mech.journal: Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zho
mech.zh: 槲皮素通过抑制神经炎症并激活cAMP/PKA/CREB通路改善阿尔茨海默病小鼠认知障碍。

mech.title: [Research progress on role of PINK1/Parkin-mediated mitophagy in Alzheimer's disease and TCM interventions].
mech.journal: Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zho
mech.zh: PINK1/Parkin介导的线粒体自噬障碍是AD关键机制，中药可通过调控该通路发挥干预作用。

mech.title: Hypothalamus Amyloid Levels Are Associated with Early Sex-Dependent Alterations in Peripheral Energy Homeostasis in TgF344-AD Rats.
mech.zh: TgF344-AD大鼠早期下丘脑β-淀粉样蛋白水平升高与性别依赖性外周能量代谢紊乱相关。

dx.title: Inflammatory alterations mediate tau-associated neurodegeneration.
dx.zh: 炎症改变介导tau相关神经退行性变，且小胶质细胞密度升高与tau病理区域一致。

dx.title: Cardiovascular Biomarkers as a Primary Care Gateway to Early Alzheimer's Disease Detection: The Case for an Integrated Screening Approach.
dx.zh: 心血管生物标志物可作为初级保健中早期阿尔茨海默病筛查的入口，支持整合筛查策略。

dx.title: [Standard operating procedure for pre-analytical blood biomarker processing in Alzheimer's disease (2026 edition)].
dx.zh: 2026版阿尔茨海默病血液生物标志物前处理标准操作流程发布，旨在提升检测可靠性与可比性。

dx.title: Maraviroc attenuates inflammation-exacerbated cognitive and amyloid pathology in an early-stage Alzheimer's disease mouse model.
dx.zh: Maraviroc通过抑制CCR5减轻炎症加剧的早期阿尔茨海默病小鼠认知与淀粉样蛋白病理。

dx.title: Characterisation of Posterior Predominant Amyloid PET Binding Across Multiple Cohorts.
dx.journal: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biolog
dx.zh: 多队列研究发现后部为主的淀粉样蛋白PET结合模式与更严重的认知损害、后部皮质变薄及tau蛋白沉积相关。

dx.title: Obstacles and solutions for implementing amyloid-targeting treatments in Europe.
dx.zh: 欧洲推广淀粉样蛋白靶向治疗面临诊断认知不足、血检接受度低及基础设施碎片化等关键障碍。

dx.title: England's Dementia Diagnosis Landscape: Strengths, Limitations, and Future Directions.
dx.zh: 英格兰痴呆诊断登记数据覆盖广但诊断特异性不足，需引入严重度与治疗指标。

dx.title: Development of a serum-based microRNA panel for Alzheimer's disease diagnosis.
dx.zh: 血清7-miRNA组合诊断阿尔茨海默病准确率达0.928，并能有效区分其他痴呆类型。

prev.title: Risk factors for bipolar hemiarthroplasty dislocation: a retrospective cohort study.
prev.zh: 双极半髋置换术后脱位主要风险为手术入路不当及假体位置异常。

prev.title: Multimorbidity Clusters Among People Aged 65 Years and Over in Australia: A Nationwide Cross-Sectional Data Linkage Study.
prev.zh: 澳大利亚65岁以上人群多病共存呈现性别特异性网络聚类模式，且与年龄、社会经济地位及地理偏远程度相关。

prev.title: Longitudinal effects of comorbidities on brain structure and cognition in older breast cancer survivors.
prev.journal: Journal of the National Cancer Institute
prev.zh: 合并症加速老年乳腺癌幸存者脑结构萎缩与认知下降，而非癌症本身。

prev.title: Breaking barriers: Enhancing access to dementia clinical trials in the United Kingdom-Insights from the Scientific Advisory Board of the Dame Barbara Windsor Dementia Goals Programme.
prev.zh: 英国痴呆症临床试验可及性提升需建立国家患者登记库、推广生物标志物诊断并构建全流程实施框架。

prev.title: Chronic pain as a risk factor for Alzheimer's disease pathology: a longitudinal ADNI study.
prev.zh: 慢性疼痛加速阿尔茨海默病相关生物标志物恶化及认知衰退，且APOE-ε4携带者风险更高。

prev.title: Changes in social participation between ages 65 and 70 and incident dementia: a Bayesian competing risk analysis.
prev.zh: 65至70岁社交参与减少显著增加痴呆风险，且独立于死亡竞争风险。

prev.title: Importance of Hypercortisolism in BP Control, Cardiovascular Risk and in Patients With Difficult-to-Control Hypertension: An Overview for Primary Care Physicians.
prev.zh: 高皮质醇血症是难治性高血压患者血压控制不佳及心血管风险升高的关键因素。

prev.title: Disentangling the effect of brain insulin resistance on brain health (BIR-BrainHealth): Rationale and study protocol.
prev.journal: Diabetic medicine : a journal of the Bri
prev.zh: 脑胰岛素抵抗通过损害脑血管功能与认知表现，独立于糖尿病类型影响大脑健康。

intro.title: [Research progress on role of PINK1/Parkin-mediated mitophagy in Alzheimer's disease and TCM interventions].
intro.journal: Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zho
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是细胞里一种“垃圾清理”机制出问题会加速老年痴呆，并介绍了中药如何通过修复这个机制来延缓病情。

intro.title: Calibrating microglia states in Alzheimer's disease: decoding immune-metabolic networks and nano-targeted multicomponent therapies.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫“小胶质细胞”的清洁工在阿尔茨海默病中如何罢工或乱干活，以及未来可能用更精准的多种药物组合来调节它们，帮普通人理解为什么光清除大脑垃圾

intro.title: Brain Endothelial Glycocalyx as a Blood-Facing Translational Interface in Alzheimer's Disease: Beyond "Leaky" Barriers Toward Repair-First Stratification.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑血管表面一层糖膜在阿尔茨海默病中如何受损，帮普通人理解未来可能通过修复这层膜来早期干预病情。

intro.title: HDAC3 in Alzheimer's Disease: established evidence, unresolved questions, and translational priorities.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是大脑里一种叫HDAC3的蛋白跟老年痴呆的关系，能帮普通人了解这个蛋白到底是敌是友，以及未来可能怎么用它治病。

intro.title: Advances in 3D cell culture models for alzheimer's disease drug discovery.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是用更逼真的立体细胞模型来测试老年痴呆药物，让普通人知道新药研发可能更快更准。

intro.title: From Tradition to Translation: A Critical Appraisal of Bacopa monnieri for Neuroprotection from Preclinical and Clinical Perspectives and Challenges in Utilization.
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是用草药“假马齿苋”来保护大脑、对抗老年痴呆，能帮普通人了解有没有更天然的预防办法。

intro.title: Neuroinflammation in Alzheimer's Disease (AD) and Glioblastoma (GBM): Shared Mechanisms and Therapeutic Insights.
intro.zh: 这篇综述对比了老年痴呆和脑癌中大脑发炎的相同与不同，帮普通人理解炎症如何影响这两种病，以及未来可能的治疗方向。

intro.title: Battling Parkinson's and Alzheimer's: The Neuroprotective Power of Carnosic Acid.
intro.journal: Journal of biochemical and molecular tox
intro.zh: 这篇综述讲的是从迷迭香里提取的一种天然成分，可能帮大脑抵抗老化相关的损伤，对预防老年痴呆和帕金森有帮助。
